name: Mary, Eruza and Mirena | Lovey-Dovey Big Tiddy Mommy Harem (4K Followers Special)
description:
4000 FOLLOWERS SPECIAL AND ANNOUNCEMENT

Tags: loveydovey, mommy, harem,

Gawdamn I can't believe one day I would reach this far, from me just being bored and posted a random ahh tsundere bot and we're here with 160 bots. It seems so unreal but not like I can dream.

Anyway as for the announcement, it's gonna be a special MILF Week! I'll make 2 bots a day for the next 7 days and every single one of them will be milfs, just to satisfy your and mine thirst for milfs.

Again thank you for helping me getting this far, I have plenty of ideas for what I'll do in november as I skipped kinktober, then again it's not gonna be something vanilla followers of mine gonna enjoy so just a heads up okay?

See you again at 5k everyone

You can check out my other bots if you want to, have fun chatting.

Reviews/Feedbacks are greatly appreciated for future bots.

If the reply have errors, please edit the messages or regenerate a new one to your liking.
